items.title: Milwaukee Bucks after trading for Caris LeVert.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Milwaukee Bucks after trading for Caris LeVert.

Gary Harris and Taurean Prince match his salary. Using the expanded trade exception now hard caps them to the first apron.

They preserve their $25.4 million trade exception and $15 million mid-level exception for more moves.

items.title: Detroit Pistons salary cap after trading Caris LeVert for Gary Harris and Taurean Prince.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Detroit Pistons salary cap after trading Caris LeVert for Gary Harris and Taurean Prince.

They continue to create more tax flexibility for Jalen Duren.

They currently have $39 million in pending outgoing salaries between LeVert and Isaiah Stewart.

items.title: Can confirm the Pistons are trading Caris LeVert to the Bucks along with two 2nd-round picks in exchange for Taurean Prince and Gary Harris. ESPN was first.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
Can confirm the Pistons are trading Caris LeVert to the Bucks along with two 2nd-round picks in exchange for Taurean Prince and Gary Harris. ESPN was first. 

Per source, the 2nd-round picks are from 2027.

items.title: [Charania] The Detroit Pistons are trading Caris LeVert and two second-round picks to the Milwaukee Bucks for Taurean Prince and Gary Harris, sources tell ESPN. Pistons will create a trade exception from the deal and savings while Bucks acquire LeVert and pick up assets.

media.title: Pistons 2025-26 Rewind: Nagging injuries kept LeVert from hitting top gear
media.description: The Pistons didn’t get the best of LeVert in 2025-26 as nagging injuries dogged him from training camp on periodically throughout the season.
